{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = King's army
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[King's army]] uses red-and-gold uniforms.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Members of the [[King's army]] wear a silvery [[steel]] badge with three keys.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c12">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate groups]]
